zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriella Mariota Erskine於1430年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪時，她的父親Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine20歲，母親Janet Elisabeth Douglas15歲。她於1448年4月26日與William Keith 1st Earl Marischal在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年12月10日在蘇格蘭金加迪爾斯同哈文享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriella Mariota Erskine于1430年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪时，她的父亲Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine20岁，母亲Janet Elisabeth Douglas15岁。她于1448年4月26日与William Keith 1st Earl Marischal在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年12月10日在苏格兰金加迪爾斯同哈文享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Muriella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive form of   Maria  , now sometimes used as an independent given name in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriella Mariota Erskine was born in 1430, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, was 20 and her mother, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, was 15. She married William Keith 1st Earl Marischal on 26 April 1448, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 10 December 1482, in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriella Mariota Erskine est née en 1430, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Keith 1st Earl Marischal le 26 avril 1448, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 décembre 1482, à Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muriella Mariota Erskine 1430 in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine 20 und ihre Mutter Janet Elisabeth Douglas 15. Sie hat am 26. April 1448 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland William Keith 1st Earl Marischal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Dezember 1482 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriella Mariota Erskine è nata il nel 1430 nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Keith 1st Earl Marischal il 26 aprile 1448, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 dicembre 1482, nel Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriella Mariota Erskineが1430年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンで生まれた時，父Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskineは20歳，母Janet Elisabeth Douglasは15歳であった。1448年4月26日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでWilliam Keith 1st Earl Marischalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年12月10日にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアストーネヘイベンで52歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muriella Mariota Erskine(이)가 1430년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Elisabeth Douglas(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1448년 4월 26일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 William Keith 1st Earl Marischal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 12월 10일 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 스톤하븐에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriella Mariota Erskine nasceu em 1430, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Keith 1st Earl Marischal em 26 de abril de 1448, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1482, em Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriella Mariota Erskine родилась в 1430 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Elisabeth Douglas, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Keith 1st Earl Marischal 26 апреля 1448 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 10 декабря 1482 г. в местности стоунэавен, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriella Mariota Erskine nació en 1430, en Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Keith 1st Earl Marischal el 26 de abril de 1448, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1482, en Stonehaven, Kincardineshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
